V-M-061.purpose: Verify encrypted admin-only MTProto client IP observability and 90-day retention.

verification-levels.module-local: Repository/model tests prove encryption, upsert, active/current/last derivation, redaction, and 90-day retention.
verification-levels.wave-level: Run with V-M-054/V-M-055 so runtime IP telemetry flows into encrypted IP observation storage without breaking usage events.
verification-levels.phase-level: Run with V-M-057/V-M-058 so only explicit admin investigation APIs and UI drawer can show decrypted IP values.

module-checks.check-1: Encrypted IP ciphertext differs from plaintext and cannot be queried through general analytics serializers.
module-checks.check-2: HMAC hash and coarse prefix remain available for abuse detection without decrypting raw IP.
module-checks.check-3: Handshake, active_connection, and close events update first_seen, last_seen, current_active, and connection counters deterministically.
module-checks.check-4: source_ip_unavailable events do not create fake IP observations.
module-checks.check-5: 90-day prune deletes expired exact IP rows and logs only counts.
module-checks.check-6: Admin-only list decrypts only the requested user's/proxy's observations with pagination.

scenarios.scenario-1: Handshake telemetry with client IP creates or updates one encrypted IP observation for the assignment and user.
scenarios.scenario-2: Current active IPs and last connected IP are derived from active/close events without guessing when source IP is unavailable.
scenarios.scenario-3: Admin-only user detail can return decrypted IPs, but general analytics, logs, audit details, and user APIs never expose raw IP strings.
scenarios.scenario-4: IP hash and coarse prefix remain available for abuse detection without decrypting raw IP.
scenarios.scenario-5: Retention prunes exact IP observations older than 90 days and preserves rollups needed for three-month graphs.
scenarios.scenario-6: Backup and XML/test smoke output do not include decrypted IP material.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_mtproto_ip_observability.py tests/test_mtproto_usage_telemetry.py tests/test_db_migrations.py -v
python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/verification/V-M-061.xml docs/modules/M-061.xml docs/plans/Phase-43.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml

redaction-rules.rule-1: Raw IP plaintext may appear only in the explicit admin investigation response and in controlled test assertions.
redaction-rules.rule-2: Logs, audit details, general analytics, top users, event lists, user APIs, XML fixtures, and smoke output must not contain decrypted raw IP strings.
redaction-rules.rule-3: Backup and restore artifacts preserve encrypted rows only and do not require decrypted IP material.

acceptance.item-1: Exact IP history is available to admins for the requested 90-day window.
acceptance.item-2: Raw IP storage is encrypted and redaction tests fail closed on accidental non-admin exposure.
acceptance.item-3: Retention bounds storage growth while preserving operational history through rollups.

V-M-061.evidence: pass-local 2026-05-20: encrypted IP observation tests, runtime ip_observation client_ip handoff, current/last/all IP derivation, 90-day prune, source_ip_unavailable handling, admin-only detail route, usage telemetry no-inflation handoff, and migration metadata guard passed.
